hooks.trigger: A Camarilla Harpy is seen slipping into a velvet-draped box during a Setite sermon.
hooks.initial_situation: Sister Nephthys offers absolution; Nosferatu hint they have audio.
hooks.escalation_path: Setites trade the recording to sway Elysium votes; PCs must intercept or redirect the blackmail.
hooks.if_ignored: Harpy debts reshape court politics; Setites gain unofficial veto power on scandals.

hooks.trigger: Officer Delaney swaps seized drugs for invitations to the theater.
hooks.initial_situation: Evidence goes missing; Delaney begs PCs to cover her tracks in exchange for files on the Prince’s death.
hooks.escalation_path: Setites push her deeper, demanding protection when Internal Affairs closes in.
hooks.if_ignored: IA bust exposes Setite ties, prompting a Camarilla crackdown that drives the cult further underground.

hooks.trigger: Cassette tapes of ‘liberation homilies’ circulate among Anarch crews.
hooks.initial_situation: Brujah start quoting Setite doctrine; tempers cool in favor of indulgent ‘study nights’.
hooks.escalation_path: Anarch action stalls; Setites offer ‘focus rites’ that hook key lieutenants on tailored vices.
hooks.if_ignored: Anarch cells fracture between zeal for action and hunger for the next sermon, stalling rebellion.

hooks.trigger: Vesper Quinn debuts an immersive show that recasts Set as the liberator of Phoenix.
hooks.initial_situation: Toreador patrons protest publicly while buying out the next showing.
hooks.escalation_path: Setites insert hidden scripture into the exhibit; PCs must edit, sabotage, or defend the piece.
hooks.if_ignored: The show becomes a cult recruitment funnel, shifting Toreador sympathies toward Setite rhetoric.

hooks.trigger: Eli Novak overdoses during a ‘liberation rite’ and is hidden in a back room.
hooks.initial_situation: The cult asks PCs to relocate him before mortal EMTs arrive.
hooks.escalation_path: If saved, Eli spreads zeal; if exposed, police scrutiny threatens the theater.
hooks.if_ignored: Body discovery links the club to mortal deaths, forcing a violent Camarilla raid.

hooks.trigger: A Giovanni broker claims Setites are poaching debtors from their mortuary side-business.
hooks.initial_situation: Setites deny it and offer to share debtor lists for a price.
hooks.escalation_path: PCs mediate or forge ledgers; Nosferatu threaten to leak names to mortals.
hooks.if_ignored: Giovanni retaliate with corpse-theft reprisals, sparking a shadow conflict around the theater.

hooks.trigger: A Malkavian mutters that the Prince’s death walked through this stage first.
hooks.initial_situation: Setites invite the seer backstage, fearing exposure or seeking to redirect the vision.
hooks.escalation_path: PCs must contain or validate the prophecy; Camarilla demand to question the seer.
hooks.if_ignored: Rumor hardens into belief that Setites engineered the murder, justifying purges.

hooks.trigger: Nosferatu suggest Sabbat scouts were hosted in the theater’s sub-basement.
hooks.initial_situation: Setites deny but offer a guided tour—minus certain locked doors.
hooks.escalation_path: PCs choose to expose, ally, or exploit the rumor; doors may hide something worse than Sabbat.
hooks.if_ignored: Camarilla deploy a hit team; Anarchs riot at the theater, giving Setites a martyr narrative.
